features: Our mildest baby bath formula, gently cleanses without drying delicate skin
Lathers quickly and rinses easily, leaving baby’s skin clean and feeling healthy
Our NO MORE TEARS formula is as gentle to the eyes as pure water
Free from dyes, parabens, phthalates, sulphates, alcohol, and soap.
description: Product Description Johnson's Baby Bath (1 x 300 ml) - Gentle Care For The Whole Family Johnson's Baby Bath is our mildest bath formula, expertly created and clinically proven to gently cleanse without drying baby’s delicate skin for up to 100 uses per bottle. With Johnson's NO MORE TEARS formula, this baby bubble bath is as gentle to the eyes as pure water. It is hypoallergenic, pH-balanced, and free from dyes, parabens, phthalates, sulphates, alcohol, and soap. Its dermatologist and paediatrician-tested formula is so mild and gentle that it is suitable for newborn care, as it gently cleanses your baby's skin, leaving it clean and feeling healthy. The bath wash lathers quickly and rinses easily, making it a great choice for kids and adults, too, perfect for the whole family. Application: For extra fluffy bubbles, pour baby bath under running water while stirring with hands. Keep out of reach of children, for external use only. Product Benefits at A Glance No more tears formula Free from dyes, alcohol, and sulphates Hypoallergenic and pH-balanced Dermatologist and paediatrician-tested Suitable for kids & adults 1 x 300ml Ingredients Water (eau), Cocamidopropyl Betaine, PEG-80 Sorbitan Laurate, Sodium Trideceth Sulfate, Acrylates Copolymer, Glycerin, Sodium Chloride, Phenoxyethanol, Disodium Lauroamphodiacetate, Glycol Distearate, Tetrasodium EDTA, Laureth-4, Ethylhexylglycerin, Sodium Hydroxide, Polyquaternium-7, Citric Acid, Parfum Directions Use Johnson's baby bubble bath and wash in a warm bath, morning or night, once a day. For bubbles, pour 2-3 capfuls under running water while stirring with hands. For baby wash, pour directly on washcloth. Lather and rinse. Safety Warning Warning: keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Box Contains 1 x Johnson's Baby Bath 300 ml Manufacturer Contact Information Foundation Park Roxborough Way Berks Sl6 3Ug See more
